chunks.text: Biomimetic Millisystems Lab Collaboration Wiki | Main / ZumyMbedUpdate From Biomimetic Millisystems Lab Collaboration Wiki Main: ZumyMbedUpdate These are the instructions to update an mbed LPC1768 with a precompiled binary image. Plug mbed into Linux

h a precompiled binary image. Plug mbed into Linux, Mac, or Windows computer with provided USB Mini-B cable The mbed should show up on the computer as a standard USB drive Drag the image linked above to the mbed USB drive folder Wait until the status

to the mbed USB drive folder Wait until the status light stops blinking rapidly Press the reset button on the mbed. For a non-IMU binary, the second blue light should start blinking at ~1Hz. For an IMU binary, the first two lights should be on solid,

U binary, the first two lights should be on solid, and the third light may or may not be blinking. It should be blinking when a ROS node is running on the Zumy reading from the mbed. Stable Images Basic RPC This only implements RPC for basic analog a

ic RPC This only implements RPC for basic analog and digital input/output mbed_basic_rpc.bin Online mbed project mbed GitHub branch ROS package branch Zumy RPC - for EE 106 Zumy Repo. This has closed-loop velocity control (@ 50 Hz) on the embedded pl

loop velocity control (@ 50 Hz) on the embedded platform and a host of other embedded improvements, with communication over RPC. Can achieve about 15 Hz sensor reading, faster if less data is requested by the odroid Note: This code is developed using

d by the odroid Note: This code is developed using an offline mbed compiler. Use these instructions to set it up on a Attach:mbed_zumy_closed_vel.bin Github branch and ROS package Zumy RPC -old This is the default functionality for Zumy with IMU and

is the default functionality for Zumy with IMU and encoders, with communication over RPC. This can achieve about 20Hz sensor reading. mbed_zumy_rpc.bin Online mbed project GitHub branch ROS package branch Packet based Image with packet-based communic

anch Packet based Image with packet-based communication at 100Hz. mbed_zumy_packet.bin Online mbed project mbed GitHub branch ROS package branch Marker/Galvo Packet based with active marker and laser galvo control. mbed_zumy_marker_galvo.bin Deprecat

galvo control. mbed_zumy_marker_galvo.bin Deprecated Images Image with RPC and basic IMU functionality zumy_mbed_imu.bin Image with encoders (really under development. Use with caution, dude!) zumy_mbed_encoders.bin Online mBed project Image with RPC

ed_encoders.bin Online mBed project Image with RPCFunction and Watchdog Timer zumy_mbed_RPCFunction.bin Online mBed project Image with RPCFunction at 70Hz zumy_mbed_RPCFunction_70Hz.bin Online mBed project ROS package Retrieved from https://wiki.eecs
